name: Soap Crayons (Non-edible)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the water and soap flakes together in a bowl.
2. Add the food coloring to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into an ice cube tray, filling each compartment.
4. Allow the crayons to harden completely.
5. Once hardened, break or cut them into pieces for easy use.
6. These crayons are safe to write with on tubs when bathing, as well as on faces and hands.
7. For a creative twist, you can mold the mixture around tiny plastic dinosaurs in an egg shape before allowing it to harden. This will create dinosaur eggs that look like real fossils!
